timeline.description: High-risk obligations (Annex III), transparency obligations (Article 50), and most other provisions enforceable
timeline.digitalOmnibusNote: The Digital Omnibus on AI (proposed November 2025) may delay Annex III high-risk obligations by up to 6 months after harmonised standards are ready (maximum December 2027). If not adopted before August 2026, original deadlines apply.

timeline.description: High-risk via Annex I (Article 6(1)) for certain product categories
Maximum possible delay for Annex III high-risk obligations under Digital Omnibus proposal
timeline.digitalOmnibusNote: Only applies if the Digital Omnibus is adopted and harmonised standards are not ready by August 2026.

highest.maxFine: EUR 35 million or 7% of worldwide annual turnover

high.maxFine: EUR 15 million or 3% of worldwide annual turnover

standard.description: Transparency obligations and supplying incorrect information
standard.maxFine: EUR 7.5 million or 1% of worldwide annual turnover
